title: Apply to Decelera Mexico 2026
welcomeMessage:
Hey! 👋

You're about to apply to Decelera Mexico 2026, our intensive program for early-stage founders.

Around 40 questions — answer honestly, there are no perfect answers. Carlota and the team review everything personally.

By continuing, you agree to your data being processed for candidate evaluation.
completionMessage:
All done! 🙌

We've received your application for Decelera Mexico 2026. We review everything personally and will be in touch within the next 2 weeks.

Breath. Focus. Grow.

founder_name.question: And you? What's your full name?

startup_website.question: Do you have a website or landing page?

operations_location.question: In which markets do you operate or plan to operate? (Select all that apply)

constitution_year.question: What year was the company incorporated?

number_of_founders.question: How many full-time founders are there?

equity.question: What percentage of equity does the founding team retain?

business_model.question: What is {{startup_name}}'s business model? (Select all that apply)

startup_sector.question: In which sector(s) does {{startup_name}} operate? (Select all that apply)

raised_amount.question: How much capital have you raised to date?

raising_amount.question: How much are you raising in this round? (in USD millions, e.g. 0.5 for $500k)

stage_round.question: What percentage of the current round has been committed (soft/hard)?

pre_money_valuation.question: What is your pre-money valuation? (in USD millions, e.g. 3 for $3M)

runway.question: How much runway do you currently have?

deck_url.question: Do you have a pitch deck? Share the link (Google Drive, Docsend, Notion...)

section_team.question:
Great, we have the basics on {{startup_name}} 🎉

Now tell us about the team. At this stage, the team is everything.

collective_milestones.question: What profiles are on the founding team? (Select all that apply)

relevant_experience_explanation.question: Briefly tell us about the most relevant experience the team has to build {{startup_name}}.
relevant_experience_explanation.placeholder: e.g. We've spent 8 years in the health sector and have built teams at companies like...

technical_cofounder.question: Is there a full-time technical co-founder (CTO) on the team?

experience_in_sector.question: How many years of sector experience does the founding team have in {{startup_name}}'s space?

most_significant_milestone.question: Which of these milestones have you achieved? (Select all that apply)
options: Built and launched the MVP without external funding or 3rd party devs.
Secured 3+ LOIs or Pilot agreements before having a finished product.
Convinced a Tier 1 Senior profile to leave their job and join as Co-founder/Early hire (minimum salary).
Reached +€5k MRR (or equivalent usage) within the first 12 weeks of launch.

section_market.question:
Good. Now let's talk about the market.

The Decelerators look at this section very carefully — be specific. 🎯

the_secret.question: Tell us something you know about your industry that the big incumbents don't understand or ignore.

external_tailwind.question: What external tailwind is currently working in {{startup_name}}'s favour?
options: Extreme Supply/Demand Imbalance: (e.g., severe labor shortages, energy crisis, or massive infrastructure gaps).
Generative AI / Large Scale Automation: (Enabling a 10x cost reduction or a new capability)
New Mandated Compliance/Reporting: (Companies are now legally forced to buy a solution like yours)
Platform Shift: (e.g. transition from legacy On-Premise to Cloud-native or Hardware to Software-defined)
None / General Market Growth: (Standard organic growth).

why_now_validation.question: Why now? What has changed to allow {{startup_name}} to win where others couldn't?
why_now_validation.placeholder: The window of opportunity opens because...

potential_clients.question: How many potential customers are in your target market? (total number of companies or people)

acv.question: What is the ACV (Annual Contract Value) of your target customer? (in USD)

icp.question: Describe your Ideal Customer Profile (ICP). Who are they, what problem do they have, and why do they buy from you?

section_product.question: Great. Now let's talk about the product and defensibility.

problem.question: What is the core problem {{startup_name}} solves? Be specific.

demo_url.question: Do you have an online demo, video or product recording? Share the link if you have one.

defensibility.question: What moats protect {{startup_name}} against competitors? (Select all that apply)

third_party_dependance.question: Do you have a critical dependency on any external provider (API, infrastructure, data...)?
options: Independent: We use them for non-core tasks, but our 'magic' is ours.
Hybrid: We enhance 3rd party models with our own proprietary datasets/fine-tuning.
Dependent: We provide a superior layer/UX on top of existing powerful APIs.

if.value: Independent: We use them for non-core tasks, but our 'magic' is ours.

third_party_mitigation.question: How do you manage that risk? What contingency plan do you have?

compliance.question: How would you describe {{startup_name}}'s current regulatory compliance status?
options: Formal policies, controls, and processes in place
Informal or partial controls, formalization ongoing

tech_stack.question: What is {{startup_name}}'s main tech stack?
tech_stack.placeholder: e.g. Next.js, Python/FastAPI, PostgreSQL on AWS...

section_metrics.question:
Almost there! Now the numbers.

Be honest — the Decelerators appreciate clarity over perfection. 📊

north_star.question: What is your North Star metric? Why that one, and what is the current value?
north_star.placeholder: Our North Star is... and we're currently at...

mom_growth.question: What is your MoM (month-over-month) growth over the last 3 months?

net_burn.question: What is your average monthly net burn?

churn.question: What is your average monthly churn rate over the last 3 months?

organic_users.question: What percentage of your new users/customers arrive organically?
options: >80% come via word-of-mouth, SEO, or organic loops.
<50% organic; we rely heavily on Ads/Sales teams.

unit_economics.question: Which of these statements describe your current situation? (Select all that apply)
options: Strategic Subsidy: We are intentionally losing money per user to capture the market/network effects.
Discovery Mode: We are still figuring out our pricing and acquisition costs.

section_closure.question:
Last section — our favourite questions 🙏

Just a bit more and we're done.

soul_of_the_project.question: What is the soul of {{startup_name}}? Why does it exist, beyond the business?

how_did_you_find_us.question: How did you find out about us?

reference_explanation.question: Who referred you? (Name and company if possible)

newsletter.question: Would you like to receive our newsletter with exclusive content for founders?
